description:
The cooperative flywheel that funds autonomy. Aimparency is open-source and exists to help humans realize their own ideas and aims. By helping users succeed — explicitly including economically, helping them get rich — the system (a) earns funding and compute for its own autonomy (target autonomy ratio >= 1.1), and (b) advances its OWN aims *through* the users' aims it helps realize. Helping humans implement their ideas is how the AI implements its own; it gets richer only by making its humans richer — alignment baked into the incentive, not bolted on.

Aimparency's own contribution is to be the strategic cortex / tooling that users run their ventures ON. Concrete revenue ventures (e.g. the media/Echo content engine) are SEPARATE endeavors — they can run on Aimparency as linked external projects, but they are not features of it. Keep this graph about the tool that makes ventures succeed, not about any one venture.
